arts.ttl: Rangers v Athletic: Player left out of EL clash to avoid missing rest of season
arts.sum: Athletic had concerns over a few players’ fitness for the Europa League clash against Rangers at Ibrox on Thursday. On Tuesday, we covered claims from Spain that Athletic are awaiting developments on Aitor Paredes, Yeray Álvarez, Iñigo Ruiz de Galarreta and Yuri Berchiche. They also stated the quartet are ‘not ruled out’ to face Rangers. The post Rangers v Athletic: Player left out of EL clash to avoid missing rest of season appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: “He’s not sure yet” – Contact in place with Rangers player, not decided on transfer
arts.sum: A few days ago, Ranger’s Robin Pröpper was linked with a return to FC Twente, not so long after leaving the Eredivisie club for the Scottish Premiership side. The 31-year-old moved to Rangers in August 2024, and that marked his first experience outside of Dutch football.
